'''tathaza''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:squadrism|squadrism]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-th-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:squadrism|squadrism]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tathaza
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæthæzæth|tæthæzæth]] || [[word:tæthæzæj|tæthæzæj]] || [[word:tæthæzæsh|tæthæzæsh]] || [[word:tæthæzæ|tæthæzæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tathathazath|tathathazath]] || [[word:tathathazaj|tathathazaj]] || [[word:tathathazash|tathathazash]] || [[word:tathathaza|tathathaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tathazath|tathazath]] || [[word:tathazaj|tathazaj]] || [[word:tathazash|tathazash]] || [[word:tathaza|tathaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tathafzath|tathafzath]] || [[word:tathafzaj|tathafzaj]] || [[word:tathafzash|tathafzash]] || [[word:tathafzaf|tathafzaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tathazatha|tathazatha]] || [[word:tathazaja|tathazaja]] || [[word:tathazasha|tathazasha]] || [[word:tathazaka|tathazaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tathazath|tathazath]] || [[word:tathazaj|tathazaj]] || [[word:tathazash|tathazash]] || [[word:tathaza|tathaza]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tathazathal|tathazathal]] || [[word:tathazajal|tathazajal]] || [[word:tathazashal|tathazashal]] || [[word:tathazakal|tathazakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tathazathatha|tathazathatha]] || [[word:tathazajaja|tathazajaja]] || [[word:tathazashasha|tathazashasha]] || [[word:tathazaka|tathazaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tathazathan|tathazathan]] || [[word:tathazajan|tathazajan]] || [[word:tathazashan|tathazashan]] || [[word:tathazakan|tathazakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tathazathaoro|tathazathaoro]] || [[word:tathazajaoro|tathazajaoro]] || [[word:tathazashaoro|tathazashaoro]] || [[word:tathazakaoro|tathazakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
